name: Ian Smith
subject: They want to send me to JAIL for opposing lockdown
body:

name: Special Election Alerts (Team Ellzey)
subject: Texas is gone:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Illegal Migrants Released Into Neighborhoods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Democrats won't let kids go to school or restaurants open at 100% capacity, but they don't seem to care about COVID-19...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57109562:JuE6SnuZN:m:1:3206719985:A3B67E913F5A819569BCE00B86FEE314:r) | |
---
Fellow American:

Democrats won't let kids go to school or restaurants open at 100% capacity, but they don't seem to care about COVID-19 when it comes to illegal migrants crossing the border.

Why?

The answer simple: their priorities are wrong. They care more about illegal migrants than hard-working American families.

**That's why I'm working with the House Freedom Fund to elect principled conservative leaders to Congress.**

You see, electing just any Republican isn't good enough - especially when it comes to securing our nation's borders. Some Republicans even want to work with the Democrats to pass amnesty.

This can't happen! We need strong conservatives who will keep their word and fight for our principles.

**[Please join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund and their priority candidates with a generous contribution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57109562:JuE6SnuZN:m:1:3206719985:A3B67E913F5A819569BCE00B86FEE314:r)**

They are helping conservatives like U.S. Reps. **Lauren Boebert** (R-CO), **Yvette Herrell** (R-NM), and **Scott Perry** (R-PA).

We need their leadership in Washington now more than ever.

The Biden Administration has released migrants into our neighborhoods without a court date and is using our tax dollars to pay for illegal migrants to stay in hotels.

And the Democrats have no plan to fix any of it!

President Biden refuses to visit the border, House Democrats refuse to hold hearings, and the media refuses to hold them accountable.

**[Please help us fight back by supporting principled conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57109562:JuE6SnuZN:m:1:3206719985:A3B67E913F5A819569BCE00B86FEE314:r)**

Together, we can secure our borders and make America great again.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57109562:JuE6SnuZN:m:1:3206719985:A3B67E913F5A819569BCE00B86FEE314:r)
JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57109562:JuE6SnuZN:m:1:3206719985:A3B67E913F5A819569BCE00B86FEE314:r)
|
---
**END OF MONTH DEADLINE**
|

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of April 5th: Sign up to host a house party & more!
body:
| |
---
From all of us at Tea Party Patriots, to all those who celebrate: _**We hope you had a wonderful Easter weekend!**_

We are proud to live in a country where freedom of religion is guaranteed for all Americans. Regardless of what big-government bureaucrats say, our God-given right to celebrate our religious holidays as we see fit is guaranteed. And for that, we are thankful.

While the Senate is in recess this week, use the time to educate your friends, family, and neighbors about the [Corrupt Politicians Act](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcC1jb3JydXB0LXBvbGl0aWNpYW5zLz9taWQ9NDM1OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=ZpF9mJZGtKKxjctTAvAUeA) – polling has shown us that most Americans don’t know anything about it, but once they learn what’s in it, they oppose it.

There’s also [a signup link to host a house party](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDRRVXByZEQzQWplbW9zTWwwZnFGdVFSNHNSVENONmV4eFJBOVYyeHc0a016RUF3L3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MzU5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=0NfbfiHG5eAX9LU_6k88RQ) to educate others about the filibuster, and more. Details below.
_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Educate Others about the Corrupt Politicians Act (H.R. 1/S. 1)
You can find the following information in our [complete "how-to" guide about election integrity](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzU5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=93Aiol82L-4M4Ed-UfEI0g).

**1\. Letter to the Editor** – use our letter to the editor template to educate the people in your community about how bad this bill is. Write your letter and submit it this week to your local paper.

**2\. Email to Friends & Network** – use our email template to share information about this bill with everyone you can email. Send it this week.

**3\. Social Media** – if you use social media, use the social media sample posts in our toolkit to post about this bill.
[VIEW HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0hSMV9Qcm90ZWN0X0VsZWN0aW9uX0ludGVncml0eV9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzU5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=vYt-mnh1C6r0puSgdZoJuA)
|
---
In the wake of “woke” corporations targeting Georgia for passing a constitutional election-integrity law, a new coalition has been launched: The Back to Neutral Coalition.
_“We reject the Left’s weaponization of corporate America against traditional beliefs and values. We work to dissuade corporations from engaging in activities that undermine free enterprise, individual liberty, limited government, free speech and the rule of law. Companies must instead return to their primary role—as fiduciaries for their investors. We seek to restore a healthy understanding of, and respect for, liberty, free enterprise and American culture all of which is being corrupted by corporate oligarchs.”_
**[Read the full story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWdyZWF0bmVzcy5jb20vMjAyMS8wMy8zMS9uZXctY29hbGl0aW9uLWZvcm1lZC10by1maWdodC13b2tlLWNvcnBvcmF0ZS1jdWx0dXJlLz9taWQ9NDM1OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=R70Wlv6GrKK776lzXx_Tzg)**
|
---
Sign up to Host a _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_
House Party on April 15th
It is imperative that the Senate filibuster remains in place. If it is removed, there will be nothing to stop the Democrats from passing radical, sweeping, transformative legislation with the slimmest of majorities – the type of legislation that should have the buy in from most of the country.

In order to educate other Americans about the filibuster and why it’s so important, we are asking you to host or attend a house party on April 15th (or sometime that following weekend), where attendees will watch Jimmy Stewart’s iconic movie, _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ , and then discuss the movie and current events surrounding the fight over the filibuster.

When you host, you will receive a host packet to help you easily organize and run your party smoothly.
[HOST A HOUSE PARTY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZDRRVXByZEQzQWplbW9zTWwwZnFGdVFSNHNSVENONmV4eFJBOVYyeHc0a016RUF3L3ZpZXdmb3JtP3VzcD1zZl9saW5rJm1pZD00MzU5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=qsPLGZYhRuWQZkFEvPeh3Q)
|
---
As Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats continue to push blatant lies about a new constitutional Georgia voting law, that simply makes it easier to vote and harder to cheat, even the fact-checkers are calling them out:
_“[A]ttempts by prominent Democrats—including the president—to tie SB 202 to the Jim Crow era are incredibly disingenuous. For starters, the bill actually expands voting access for most Georgians, mandating precincts hold at least 17 days of early voting—including two Saturdays, with Sundays optional—leading up to the election...”_
Yet, corporations, ignorant to the facts, are caving under the pressure of their outright lies, taking action against the people of Georgia...

**[This is not right and the people of Georgia deserve better.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvamltLWNyb3ctZ2VvcmdpYS12b3RpbmctZGlzaW5nZW51b3VzLWNsYWltcy1iaWRlbj9taWQ9NDM1OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=TTjDkhV7vYGJW7Ka-sTsgw)**
|
---
Freeroots Campaigns – fast, easy activism!
Freeroots is an online activism portal, created by one of our allies, that allows you to take action in about thirty seconds. It is so, so easy and fast! Visit the following campaigns and share them online!

* **[Save the filibuster](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL2ZpZ2h0LTQtZmlsaWJ1c3Rlcj9taWQ9NDM1OTgmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=p0nSCnO9RWzQ2TZst67DMQ)**

* **[Stay Out of Politics, Facebook and Twitter!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3N0YXlvdXRvZnBvbGl0aWNzLWZiLXR3P21pZD00MzU5OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=wrBscgd-tz2h4zuIgzbO5g)**
* **[Tell Amazon to STOP Funding Black Lives Matter](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDk1LTNkM2QxMmYwNTViNzQ3NGQ5ODc3NzI5ODNmN2MxOTU3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mcmVlcm9vdHMuY29tL2dvL3RlbGwtYW1hem9uLXRvLXN0b3AtZnVuZGluZy1ibGFjay1saXZlcy1tYXR0ZXI_bWlkPTQzNTk4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=c9eQlh1USEwQSLLESLJ3nw)**

clean_body: | | From all of us at Tea Party Patriots, to all those who celebrate: We hope you had a wonderful Easter weekend! We are proud to live in a country where freedom of religion is guaranteed for all Americans. Regardless of what big-government bureaucrats say, our God-given right to celebrate our religious holidays as we see fit is guaranteed. And for that, we are thankful. While the Senate is in recess this week, use the time to educate your friends, family, and neighbors about the – polling has shown us that most Americans don’t know anything about it, but once they learn what’s in it, they oppose it. There’s also to educate others about the filibuster, and more. Details below. Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Educate Others about the Corrupt Politicians Act (H.R. 1/S. 1) You can find the following information in our . 1\. Letter to the Editor – use our letter to the editor template to educate the people in your community about how bad this bill is. Write your letter and submit it this week to your local paper. 2\. Email to Friends & Network – use our email template to share information about this bill with everyone you can email. Send it this week. 3\. Social Media – if you use social media, use the social media sample posts in our toolkit to post about this bill. | In the wake of “woke” corporations targeting Georgia for passing a constitutional election-integrity law, a new coalition has been launched: The Back to Neutral Coalition. “We reject the Left’s weaponization of corporate America against traditional beliefs and values. We work to dissuade corporations from engaging in activities that undermine free enterprise, individual liberty, limited government, free speech and the rule of law. Companies must instead return to their primary role—as fiduciaries for their investors. We seek to restore a healthy understanding of, and respect for, liberty, free enterprise and American culture all of which is being corrupted by corporate oligarchs.” | Sign up to Host a Mr. Smith Goes to Washington House Party on April 15th It is imperative that the Senate filibuster remains in place. If it is removed, there will be nothing to stop the Democrats from passing radical, sweeping, transformative legislation with the slimmest of majorities – the type of legislation that should have the buy in from most of the country. In order to educate other Americans about the filibuster and why it’s so important, we are asking you to host or attend a house party on April 15th (or sometime that following weekend), where attendees will watch Jimmy Stewart’s iconic movie, Mr. Smith Goes to Washington , and then discuss the movie and current events surrounding the fight over the filibuster. When you host, you will receive a host packet to help you easily organize and run your party smoothly. | As Joe Biden and his fellow Democrats continue to push blatant lies about a new constitutional Georgia voting law, that simply makes it easier to vote and harder to cheat, even the fact-checkers are calling them out: “[A]ttempts by prominent Democrats—including the president—to tie SB 202 to the Jim Crow era are incredibly disingenuous. For starters, the bill actually expands voting access for most Georgians, mandating precincts hold at least 17 days of early voting—including two Saturdays, with Sundays optional—leading up to the election...” Yet, corporations, ignorant to the facts, are caving under the pressure of their outright lies, taking action against the people of Georgia... | Freeroots Campaigns – fast, easy activism! Freeroots is an online activism portal, created by one of our allies, that allows you to take action in about thirty seconds. It is so, so easy and fast! Visit the following campaigns and share them online! | Ongoing Action Items The House press gallery is trying to block The Epoch Times from renewing their press pass. calling on the press gallery to reinstate their press pass! Go to our website and. Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email. | In liberty, Jenny Beth | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. subject: Friend, it’s all because you believed in Young Kim

body:
Many people downplayed Young Kim's potential, but because you believed in her wholeheartedly, she's one of the first Korean American women serving in Congress.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gQt-teYUtO6OYtDjwizdKvR8aOUYG7Lups9vOdn3bU4s6_KXZ-S7Sb5i9Hm1qGbD8MCFN4qcT-DeB3Ztw6_MoX1XxOtnUyRXp4Q5AO1YrQl_oKs_lTTqy401dUIqMn8XGVFfcUNYgQkk8IKdnhjKgrWzAjy7HtYL3MzA0A3xxN_9W15KwKGNDxS4_vYUrRS8qw8_p6K_qURjYLRdPQ54q_9Vcs8jNlsI_mX-2d-MUvv0mlk4KjK0YU3MiIzPxD8JrdOHNpxQtxDRvqg-c7WZQZ-tp_oU_4_q4y6007zv8sMbKObi24GZKKkLvpBnEO1U9wsxKlZ_z6rppv0HwPLYj_9PrB7pDVnSkZnLX2VFpyQ7iF0tpoKczjoxDyXm-AkrrbOfBmxWZsHh9-NPp-XTRggibGhuDdWR0rP25yy4X0PKJ0YDCekFFW828onuoJ6BqyvUgQJoKFMWhcIx-N8tDA==&c=rdJFEb8uWh5Cq8AH9AnsfOTW6hlK7zwqNH1OrqvL1ZVPGS6LVkI0oQ==&ch=GnsHmjhjk1Tk9G7n2b65hamn39fHgPtcC7uELZp6h2ZpyVnMPXHk5Q==)

Because of **YOU** , Young Kim defeated a Pelosi-backed candidate and is proudly serving in the 117th Congress today. Because of **YOU** she is able to fight for lower taxes, small business support, affordable healthcare, schools reopening, immigration reform, and battling homelessness in California. Because of **YOU** she is blazing her own path in Congress as one of the first Korean-American women ever elected to the House. For that, she's forever grateful. Now, Young Kim is faced with a new challenge and she needs your help again.**A Democratic candidate declared his campaign against her.** In an effort to make sure her seat is safe, we're asking 5,000 of our top supporters to make a contribution before midnight tonight. You were at the top of our list, Friend. subject: We're up on TV to Defend our First-in-the-Nation Primary 📺
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Help spread the news!

| | Derek,

When we told you we were going to defend our First-in-the-Nation Primary, we meant it.

We launched a TV ad this past weekend to hold the D.C. Democrats accountable and organize New Hampshire voters against the latest threat to our First-in-the-Nation Presidential Primary.

Watch our new TV Ad here:

When it comes to defending our First-in-the-Nation Primary, every Granite Stater needs to stand with Secretary of State Bill Gardner. He sees proposed legislation in D.C. as what it is: a direct threat to New Hampshire's ability to run our own elections and to maintain our Primary tradition.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: Announcing our newest Justice Democrat:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
**We have our FIRST primary challenger for 2022: Odessa Kelly! She 's running for Congress to unseat a corporate Democrat in Nashville. [Can you donate directly to Odessa's campaign to help her raise $50,000 right away for a strong progressive primary?](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=9789bef9c5&e=eff630ad9c)**
Born and raised in Nashville, Tennessee, Odessa is a longtime public servant and co-founder of Stand Up Nashville, an organization fighting for racial and economic justice. She's committed to making her community and this country a better place for people who've been ignored for far too long. Odessa will passionately fight for a Green New Deal and Medicare for All to level the playing field and build pathways out of poverty for people across the country.
"I'm running to give voice and power to those
who have been neglected by the status quo."
**Odessa is running to upend the status quo.** She's challenging a corporate Democrat in TN-05 who's been in office for over 30 years and takes hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate PACs -- the very same corporate PACs that want to block Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. He's out-of-touch and has spent decades in office dragging his feet on policies that would help working people. Odessa will champion those policies and fight for the people.
**[Odessa needs a strong start to show the political establishment that she's a serious contender for Congress. She just launched her campaign today -- can you donate $25 or anything at all directly to Odessa's campaign so we can help her raise $50,000 in her first 24 hours?](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=b51bd2de3f&e=eff630ad9c)**
**[Contribute $25](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=db4c8015c0&e=eff630ad9c)**
It takes all of us to help Justice Democrats run successful primary campaigns against entrenched incumbents. Early grassroots fundraising is an extremely important part of the campaign -- it will bring important media coverage to the campaign and help Odessa get the organizing tools and resources she needs to run a good primary early on.
**While corporate Democrats are waiting for their next big checks from Wall Street, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel executives, we 're helping our endorsed candidates build a movement for the people. [That's why we need you to chip in right now on Odessa's campaign launch day. Donate whatever you can today!](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=57b7c72a7b&e=eff630ad9c)**
We can't wait to help Odessa run this race in Tennessee's Fifth Congressional District, and we can't wait to keep you updated on how you can help.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

P.S. It's extremely hard for regular, working people in this country to run for office because it requires so much time and money. Corporate Democrats can reach out to rich friends and corporate PACs for big donations. **[Justice Democrats don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so it's critical that we bring in a wave of grassroots donations for Odessa right now. Give $25 directly to Odessa's campaign, and collectively we can make a huge difference in her race.](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=3950b724dc&e=eff630ad9c)**

**[Donate](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=9724992122&e=eff630ad9c)**
---
Paid for by Justice Democrats
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=457b2fec67&e=eff630ad9c&c=a8e2422432). Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Please, Friend, I need you to read EVERY WORD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
I know you receive lots of emails - but I really think you should read my thoughts regarding "woke" culture and the intolerant Left.

Friend,
I know you receive lots of emails - but I really think you should read my thoughts regarding "woke" culture and the intolerant Left.

_Please read every word. It 's important. _

These words come directly from my heart and I hope that after reading my op-ed below, [**you will choose to stand with me.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)

[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)
---
-Tim
**
Tim Scott: Let 's set the record straight on 'woke supremacy' and racism**

I was criticized in this newspaper last week for saying that "woke supremacy" is as bad as white supremacy.

My comments, of course, were not comparing the long history of racial hate to the very short history of wokeism. That would be ludicrous. I am painfully aware that four centuries of racism, bigotry and killings does not compare to the nascent woke movement. As a country, we continue to pay a heavy price for our original sin.

My comments were a sound-bite-length reaction to yet another media figure accusing me of being a token for Republicans. Unfortunately, this isn't the first time I've heard that type of slur. I spoke out because I am gravely concerned for our future if we ignore either type of supremacy -- both of which are rooted in racism or discrimination.

Criticism has included the suggestion that I and other Republicans are "living proof that neither racial nor gender diversity is a guarantor of progressive, inclusive and broad-minded thinking. Diversity, much in vogue, has its limits." In other words, my ideology does not match that which they prescribe based on my complexion.

That is woke supremacy. It is the "tolerant" left's intolerance for dissent. It is a progressive conception of diversity that does not include diversity of thought. It is discrimination falsely marketed as inclusion.

This isn't the first time the woke folk have come after me. I've been called a member of the "coon squad" for sharing my story and conservative vision for America at the 2020 Republican convention. A former leader of the NAACP called me a ventriloquist puppet. I've been called an Uncle Tom and a house n-----, among thousands of other insults.

I am proud to be both a Black man and a Republican. Because of those aspects of my identity, many critics have ignored things I have actually done. In the past few years alone, my Republican colleagues and I secured permanent funding for historically Black colleges and universities for the first time in history. We've passed bipartisan legislation to help those battling sickle cell disease. We've fought for school choice because poor, and often minority, parents are consistently the ones without choice. And I helped author the Republican tax reform that lowered taxes for single moms, doubled the child tax credit and brought Black unemployment to historic lows. That list barely scratches the surface.

Critics discount these accomplishments for the Black community because it conflicts with the caricature they've created of what it means to be Black and to be a Republican.

But the victims of woke supremacy aren't just Republicans. After a recent vote against her fellow Democrats' attempt to pass a job-killing minimum-wage hike during the pandemic, my friend and colleague Sen. Kyrsten Sinema (D-Ariz.) received so many death threats that she had to increase security for herself and her partner. I've received similar threats. A man -- a "woke" Black man -- is to be sentenced this month for threatening to gut me "like a fish" and blow me away with his rifle.

Woke culture is speeding our country toward ideological and literal segregation. Already, Columbia University has decided to host segregated graduation celebrations based on race or socioeconomic status. We are living in a society that has allowed "autonomous zones" that effectively prohibit law enforcement from protecting people from crime, and campus "safe spaces" to protect students from others' opinions.

Carving out public spaces for people of only one race or mind-set? Since when is separate but equal back in vogue?

Two wrongs don't make a right.

When you give license for one person or group of people to discriminate, you give license for everyone to discriminate. Dividing society along racial lines is everything leaders in the civil rights era fought against, yet leaders of the woke movement are attempting to codify discrimination in law, including by Democrats setting aside funding exclusively for non-White farmers in their recent stimulus package. Blood wasn't shed on the Edmund Pettus Bridge or the streets of Birmingham so that we could reinvent the mistakes of our past.

Six years ago, Rep. John Lewis (D-Ga.), who was not just a civil rights icon but also my friend, asked me to co-chair the march to Selma on the 50th anniversary of Bloody Sunday. When I think of my vision for America, I think about standing shoulder to shoulder on that bridge with John and Presidents Barack Obama and George W. Bush, walking forward together.

So, we collectively have a choice: We can continue down the path of toxic woke mandates and virtue signaling that themselves create discrimination, segregation and hate, or we can choose to create equality of opportunity and access to the American Dream for everyone. Because I believe in the goodness of America, I remain hopeful that we will choose the Opportunity Society.
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/op-ed/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210405_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1055294-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210405_please-first-name-i-need-you-to-read-every-word)
---
**
**
****
****
PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

John Lewis (D-Ga.), who was not just a civil rights icon but also my friend, asked me to co-chair the march to Selma on the 50th anniversary of Bloody Sunday. When I think of my vision for America, I think about standing shoulder to shoulder on that bridge with John and Presidents Barack Obama and George W. Bush, walking forward together. So, we collectively have a choice: We can continue down the path of toxic woke mandates and virtue signaling that themselves create discrimination, segregation and hate, or we can choose to create equality of opportunity and access to the American Dream for everyone. Because I believe in the goodness of America, I remain hopeful that we will choose the Opportunity Society. ** ** PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 | | TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE | 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD, CHARLESTON, SC 29407 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: Judicial Watch Obtains Additional Records of FDA Purchases of Fetal Tissue for “Humanized Mice” Project; Agency Wanted “Fresh, Shipped on Wet Ice” Fetal Organs
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it received an additional 575 pages of records from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) showing the agency spent tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars to buy human fetal tissue from California-based Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR). The tissue was used in creating “humanized mice” to test “biologic drug products.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 5, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22536&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVtYW5pemVkLW1pY2UtZmRhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDUxNTI1NDg=) | **[Judicial Watch Obtains Additional Records of FDA Purchases of Fetal Tissue for “Humanized Mice” Project; Agency Wanted “Fresh, Shipped on Wet Ice” Fetal Organs](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22536&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVtYW5pemVkLW1pY2UtZmRhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDUxNTI1NDg=)** Judicial Watch announced that it received an additional 575 pages of records from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) showing the agency spent tens of thousands of taxpayer dollars to buy human fetal tissue from California-based Advanced Bioscience Resources (ABR). The tissue was used in creating “humanized mice” to test “biologic drug products.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22536&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaHVtYW5pemVkLW1pY2UtZmRhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDUxNTI1NDg=)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22546&F=H&) | **[Homeless Shelter Cleared to House Illegal Aliens, Dozens Infected with COVID-19](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22546&F=H&)** As if the illegal immigrant crisis along the U.S.-Mexico border were not bad enough, homeless Americans have been booted from a temporary shelter in southern California to make room for scores of migrants, dozens of them infected with COVID-19. Since the Biden administration rolled out the welcome mat, thousands of illegal aliens have entered the country, most of them minors classified as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) by the feds. Now the government is scrambling to meet its legal obligation of caring for them at facilities nationwide operated by the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22546&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22523&F=H&) | **[Illegal Aliens Released by BP Commit Home Invasion Robberies, Store Burglaries in U.S. Town](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22523&F=H&)** Violence sparked by the illegal immigrant crisis along the U.S.-Mexico border has spilled over into a sleepy little town unaccustomed to the devastating impact large influxes have on bigger cities near major crossings. A series of crimes committed by illegal aliens and human smugglers (coyotes) has left the usually tranquil Arizona town of Sonoita, population of about 800, in shock. Veteran ranchers and business owners in the area interviewed by Judicial Watch say that in the last few days there have been two home invasion robberies and two local stores were burglarized by a group of illegal immigrants who had just been released into their community by the U.S. Border Patrol in the predawn hours. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22523&F=H&)

For countless Americans, this double standard of justice has destroyed confidence in the fair administration of justice. Americans would never have known about Hillary Clinton’s email and related pay for play scandals but for Judicial Watch’s diligence. We expect that the Biden State and Justice Departments will continue to protect her and cover up their own misconduct as we press for additional accountability through the courts. ### [The California Left’s Abuse of IRS Info ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53323&L=22548&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2NhLWlycy1pbmZvLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MDUxNTI1NDg=) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch is fighting to protect the First Amendment rights of non-profit donors across America from a new California law which “compels the disclosure of certain organization’s donors [to its state government].” “This challenge to California law has now made its way to the Supreme Court,” Fitton explained last month. Filing an _amici curiae_ (friends of the court) brief, Judicial Watch is asking the Supreme Court to consider or take up the case. “We’re obviously asking for this California law to be overturned,” Fitton continued. ******
🚨 BREAKING: MLB moves All-Star Game to Promote Socialist Agenda 🚨******

That's right: _**THE MLB HAS CAVED TO THE WOKE MOB.**_

body:
Have you seen this yet? We can't make this Liberal hypocrisy up.

⚠️⚠️ **BREAKING NEWS ** ⚠️⚠️

subject: re: Our opponents 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
We've been saying from day one that Pennsylvania is going to be home to the single most important *and competitive* Senate race of 2022.
John Fetterman is undeniably our best shot to flip this seat blue, elect a true advocate for PA's working families, and make sure that every voice -- from every one of our commonwealth's 67 counties -- is heard in the U.S. Senate.
**But just hours ago,_another_ opponent announced their campaign.**
We've said this before, and we really mean it: No matter who's getting in this race on the Democratic side, they would be a hell of a lot better Senator than Pat Toomey ever was. Full stop. But it doesn't change the fact that this announcement makes it even more important for us to build a powerful grassroots campaign that has what it takes to win the primary AND the general election. _That can only happen if as many people as possible who read this email today chip in what they can, so we need to ask:_
**[_Will you donate $25 to our campaign right now? This race is already shaping up to be extremely competitive, but with enough early resources, we can send John Fetterman to represent us in Washington._](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=bc351af060&e=0490676c9f)**
**[Contribute $25](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=a94dec0504&e=0490676c9f)**
We know that our dude John has what it takes to win statewide, because he already has. In fact, he'll likely be the only candidate who joins this race -- Democrat, Republican, or independent -- who's already shown they can win statewide in our commonwealth.
In 2018, John and Governor Wolf defeated their GOP opponents by 852,000 votes over Donald Trump's hand-picked choice. They received the highest amount of votes *ever* as a ticket in a gubernatorial election. _Boom._
It's clear that John Fetterman is the leader we need in this moment. This incredible grassroots team has proven that time and again so far in this race. But it will take undeniable, unstoppable momentum to win this race to replace Pat Toomey with a true fighter for working Pennsylvanians, so we need to ask for your support today:
**[_Contribute $25 to our campaign right now if you 're all in for John Fetterman. Winning this race will come down to the amount of support we receive in this crucial early stage, so any amount will go a long way._](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=e09399a3f1&e=0490676c9f) 💪**
Thank you for being such a vital part of this team.
-- All of us at Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Today is a *reeeally* important day to let John know you've got his back. He's been fighting for working people across Pennsylvania for nearly two decades -- _and now he needs us in his corner._ **[_Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to show you 're all in for John Fetterman._](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=d5c3cbbb86&e=0490676c9f)**
**[Donate](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=617a777b58&e=0490676c9f)**
---
Paid for by Fetterman for PA
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=da3f5e1560&e=0490676c9f). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://johnfetterman.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=167e8489a38c83af7b1c44995&id=864dcb2a0a&e=0490676c9f&c=0555536acd). Mail us: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Why April is so important
body:
#

Friends, we're reaching out to you today because this month is crucial.
Last month, universal background checks passed in the House. And right now, the bill could be voted on at any time in the Senate.
As an organization, we've been doing everything we can to show the Senate that Americans want universal background checks **NOW.**
Timing is so important, and the sooner we pass this bill, the sooner we can begin to save lives. We can't afford to wait another day to act, which is why we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving background checks legislation that will be voted on in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad883/4161410691/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210405-1-b")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad884/4161410691/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210405-1-b") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad887/4161410691/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210405-1-b")

---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad898/4161410691/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210405-1-b") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad885/4161410691/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210405-1-b")

We've already had multiple high-profile mass shootings devastate our nation this year. As more guns are being sold, we need to do everything we can to make sure they don't get into the hands of the wrong people.
Help us pass universal background checks in the Senate as soon as possible.
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee16f/78fba3aa/635ca786/50aad883/4161410691/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210405-1-b")**

name: Mike
subject: I’m pleading with you on this one.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
How soon before they come for everyday Americans like you and me?

First they came for Trump. His actions were "outrageous," they said.

Then they came for anyone who spoke out online, silencing them as "dangerous voices."

name: Laura Loomer
subject: BREAKING: Justice Thomas recognizes Laura Loomer’s Fight
body:
After they deferred my case five times in a row, the United States Supreme Court denied to hear my case against Big Tech for their ongoing censorship and discrimination against conservatives.
---
After they deferred my case five times in a row, the United States Supreme Court denied to hear my case against Big Tech for their ongoing censorship and discrimination against conservatives.
| | | | Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/ErDOyxZsPZGTm0si07JvggnUDLRKWca7qaqEpjU_kUd0oO1a4HlyF42hmdqU6CMKygsL4l44bVtpFMXSyS4kKCUBTITYGcZ2kibqIn138lIWmOVj-ii2YZb7jAXqoST2oXU_rNfEhvJmAtC8XysCb7mZ17hOeiAcG74C5CdhQfuoyB_Lua5cOzloQfBBYIGl-0OHrfarykODEUJJR0mnyiQhOMhXcM1-vsb7dhhoTciktWJFeR_ZSMWLL4ibwTj79tGXPo526YCEeiT9ct6K9z4x75wXxwrmh4CMeKNZHw) After they deferred my case five times in a row, the United States Supreme Court denied to hear my case against Big Tech for their ongoing censorship and discrimination against conservatives.

While SCOTUS denied my case, there’s a silver lining – **and a clear indication we’ll win this fight in the future!**

On the same day as my denial, Justice Clarence Thomas released his opinion in another case involving President Trump and Twitter.

In that opinion, Justice Thomas specifically referred to MY CASE by its docket number saying:

> While this case involves a suit against a public official, the Court properly rejects today a separate petition alleging that digital platforms, not individuals on those platforms, violated public accommodations laws, the First Amendment, and antitrust laws. Pet. for Cert., O. T. 2020, No. 20–969. The petitions highlight two important facts. Today’s digital platforms provide avenues for historically unprecedented amounts of speech, including speech by government actors. Also unprecedented, however, is the concentrated control of so much speech in the hands of a few private parties. **We will soon have no choice but to address how our legal doctrines apply to highly concentrated, privately owned information infrastructure such as digital platforms.**
Read that last line again coming from Supreme Court Justice Thomas:
> **We will soon have NO CHOICE but to address how our legal doctrines apply to highly concentrated, privately owned information infrastructure such as digital platforms.**
This sets the stage for what I’ve been working on for years with my legal team – and we’ll be filing another BOMBSHELL lawsuit very soon!

[**Join the fight now by funding my next lawsuit that will end Cancel Culture.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/9jXMGsYxNoucxSGV5lNqHosGJmdEfdZWD3EEtdOxQay8cQptDwfv5QHe3Ou5N4jI4fEyX5LQKzzoijKP8J6uYRlU9wH63GOUR8CkHH9OnnocOOyia6YzUj205fvoNX9xV0pXAECYTufMUR4codO60CQeYnHb8n2aUEL7moTXbdTErfilSHKKmVwRWlfxQRwW7htantIWZhoC5Udl32j3NSWL9b7_yjSPvs0gmEie6ss4ijMslmkmH4JKZzqcQrFOdsaImGwnWh_lLfIzzobAh0fxgkWj_IlgGeCJY3Zh-g)

Justice Thomas used my lawsuit to acknowledge that it’s time to address the legal doctrines that Big Tech have been hiding behind to enable their censorship of conservatives and discriminatory practices.

The ball is in our court to make that happen!

[**Help me move forward by donating today.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/8Cb44oTVtq6kmomUg-7ShnAjKOwso7kWTlDTf8WDqO5-ErwQEh7PB96BeM6BbY3rPxlj8_p-Fz0HEMZEUtFBRPFcIM9ed2beKLhXC4ZaqScYl6Wl-lGa1QJzsKN01DfWA9KIPTbSNLPLIpYv6gBXMm2MCAJGdFPwvQiwKQ2rzFihdoM4WPMn9Yc-PMmGo6tviJSgHF-IZmhomwTv6Jk808M6EcXdlB_QMGtqdxezbrTZpZuURG1km3cKbrJ9_QnnHDXGtkS73GRM7DwT4DiPYtunCRuOASjK5DHbSadLwQ)

Earlier this year, I made the tough decision to spend $50,000 on research and legal fees to start a very specific case against Big Tech – I’ll be able to release the details as soon as we file.

But this case is going to cost $250,000 or more and I have to rely on your support and the support of thousands of others to raise that significant amount of money.

[**Chip in today. $25, $50, $100 or more will get me closer to fully funding this lawsuit.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/4XtURttZ_YXeG2P4vdcY21ZxnH5_ppT1YYLnX7YVR7iDf3ffRPMzv0INTxob7yGhBj8SFmLQowxj7_darv4KrwOlB3eKt3dZB7_r1RzNbZnbfvHMF8FzyHIYAXdgmhU1blCTRmQdCAc1RuVSUTTDr6rXDnF7gLDx7F1kEUTXNDwdVt7QVC2egjsc4TX3eXcAALQSwvcMkgK6FaP6dc_TSec1Ed-pgZBpPD42V0nhOA_eDDJols8VBINgijBRNQ3jtSGFRICbUO6vJ0EJw_A24fuf-63bx2ml6H8F3SX9dQ)

Now is the time and it’s up to us to make it happen.

You just saw it for yourself. The most respected Supreme Court justice just validated my legal work.

I’m thankful that Justice Thomas is listening and weighing in on my legal arguments, and I’m incredibly hopeful that we have a big win ahead of us that will help finally end Cancel Culture!

Thanks again for all that you do and please, [**chip in today!**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/6S-HxesrXGA_xPoGjwbUZQtQQVY-1MeKtZn620A2KQauYbTAbf7Pdo8uehBeqQe_ZmxUi9pkqG2Iq8JMJbVjtFs2CUd5JZzoZASt2oXM-ejHZL6QxHXEZgf6wCESkyBJSNuJhmW_gD0CrDGQ23ZzppxS-JxFFy0C3nqNXItAiC7ddfJVog7Kfl0MlorNLPO8z5i-BRVQMwiCRMMQP8B_zLHxdUVvui4aEBAuEZtIp8FArwdTIOGTsThoF3tofRetHv_dH9rZracd_OAmBAAkRjwY8gID1ledZfLde23y1A)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/zHfuc1fFyITNIc67XsIxFLukLABIvBSWWfJxyUB_sCPRa8xHcBf8lBJwWO62nOgro2bqsOMfbli3i9BRqzcKn177tygzO10HZtbJmOYdAvfX2b1Kt28luKe6pcAOZlWVT0PuNSEOzOt4Ri7J)

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/xeqe72JJ0FASaGsJ40c8EsBdLpLaTWso-bRoR_x3Dgc2CkK6elzh5d2YsSsdEhnY1g3_RNzfZ6lxj8P26JcoKdkduMUZ0pMX7mD3zYISGarFfCkjcF6sCuqOYMlMvknL1KpzkBlkGBBkhWk9h6V0cTHqwiXKFd-UW5XwDNEJd94SG4JmNVJWzwGZuaBedcXohcMsUrFhuand_BkE6jUbdXRCsqGo4SlEwSV88EKrOxRmP3vGnLlfIOpGcLWkMHE6Qrtm2-Y6ae_2NYAw5zCxg7wQEfuo_moTqEzO9RM0KQ) After they deferred my case five times in a row, the United States Supreme Court denied to hear my case against Big Tech for their ongoing censorship and discrimination against conservatives.

While SCOTUS denied my case, there’s a silver lining – **and a clear indication we’ll win this fight in the future!**

On the same day as my denial, Justice Clarence Thomas released his opinion in another case involving President Trump and Twitter.

In that opinion, Justice Thomas specifically referred to MY CASE by its docket number saying:

> While this case involves a suit against a public official, the Court properly rejects today a separate petition alleging that digital platforms, not individuals on those platforms, violated public accommodations laws, the First Amendment, and antitrust laws. Pet. for Cert., O. T. 2020, No. 20–969. The petitions highlight two important facts. Today’s digital platforms provide avenues for historically unprecedented amounts of speech, including speech by government actors. Also unprecedented, however, is the concentrated control of so much speech in the hands of a few private parties. **We will soon have no choice but to address how our legal doctrines apply to highly concentrated, privately owned information infrastructure such as digital platforms.**
Read that last line again coming from Supreme Court Justice Thomas:
> **We will soon have NO CHOICE but to address how our legal doctrines apply to highly concentrated, privately owned information infrastructure such as digital platforms.**
This sets the stage for what I’ve been working on for years with my legal team – and we’ll be filing another BOMBSHELL lawsuit very soon!

[**Join the fight now by funding my next lawsuit that will end Cancel Culture.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/KarOFJeDCWUteH_iiqYi-gs1iMCKOaKFfjY0jrEg0HWeKbX4_D9-bdGgOBXkunWL7Ewe8BQzHgYT1X3iazhql8Xwma0AAlWT9aDpvy7MLK76pKd2LAashyOr9gXPCAAqbEm0fzoXUDH8jmY3jx1F9qdY3kPEmIaDmH68D8BdWUzm_Jycji3aFV3HLwhHl4LeZdGm-LvkzinL5ezPuK8FNQUDdKwte0zVWfKrJgoBbr9ElgslCtljZn9Xy1xJTkjK8eF1LjTnc531PO-VQ3TVqTBzEajGsn-IddZxEYW71A)

Justice Thomas used my lawsuit to acknowledge that it’s time to address the legal doctrines that Big Tech have been hiding behind to enable their censorship of conservatives and discriminatory practices.

The ball is in our court to make that happen!

[**Help me move forward by donating today.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/onDTwsCvlc-UFYhX7RacV2df8qHWQXqiwTLOJow5JW6reBshzePubvUPYe3i5pnc973hIojhZjxW_WCiwzQA9gVWUmpO5euHryg2IpvTHk8z4w25DdEkvp3JoBJorJC_44UV21tTDouGcXA4znf9sCCuYVjpbrWrHLstQjcHVqXIVkQqYSTbbFQl3FTsxIZs1wMNyL3uERLT6SGzgZB1bM11iHn82ffSuwlBVj8_EnxlG-bKUseytYGcMqFcHhXpKTkbFkQwq1XXM0j62fkSXle1enD_3V2298zAPmpieg)

Earlier this year, I made the tough decision to spend $50,000 on research and legal fees to start a very specific case against Big Tech – I’ll be able to release the details as soon as we file.

But this case is going to cost $250,000 or more and I have to rely on your support and the support of thousands of others to raise that significant amount of money.

[**Chip in today. $25, $50, $100 or more will get me closer to fully funding this lawsuit.**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/XI6ZVw0XeKbh_PLtjrtotztnQFL1TTiQaZwVSgnK7ra4q8tA6QtWhDaf6hhW8o8hoKHaRzHOrqxAvcUZUzgDXTcYsssb2f62aefbwMUobzWXsgOWZb3MzixLDZxGNsh9UEJNiE_usN3R_a4HFnEiU6d7OAK2bCnBFc1nj9avvkOQiFwfQ0DnuILH35uqeznWvomsqCxfM5MVlYMj-6GadO8V4mimPenj3ojiUIU5SvUSTb_e-M_XS7l3kJ-D3yKr1hlCFh1uQXeTW62H3tnsP1DmuDP7A8Nk-LtTpgPg4g)

Now is the time and it’s up to us to make it happen.

You just saw it for yourself. The most respected Supreme Court justice just validated my legal work.

I’m thankful that Justice Thomas is listening and weighing in on my legal arguments, and I’m incredibly hopeful that we have a big win ahead of us that will help finally end Cancel Culture!

Thanks again for all that you do and please, [**chip in today!**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/qET7Z0Ltu-DaDrn415BzTWH_Z1HN7UralCyM_D3ogXKWS9Ufr7eiiW74OxPYUN_YUSmFBzuvi1LxY69C0ba2jr2ToA4sUd2RK49wAOunwE2IkiEt9fOb5_E4KqDw5ElGwkPSQbrygk3PMEVwMIYCL1DTXaUHv9KeaPRQV8RK7blYc-kZLpQ3q5JvESo1neixB3TTYWmR1XFpdheiV3c6UvMZoj0PtWMtsTPKAd8hRoGZpn3lDT7gb5x5NLAhVmtQIOc4Y2Osr6_eQkrMd-tzBy2XYAmaO2_AyYqdBSF_TA)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: A post-COVID reinvention of higher education
body:
It is no secret our postsecondary institutions have floundered during the pandemic. In October of 2020, researchers confirmed that disruptions caused [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1efe712963fc490889ca4f3bc946e7c8&_e=JTEvL-Zg71hyYIebmHSaZK5LumADbr7kNhCds9nQ9CTdE2r9lVMccI4RTmQqAx5cXIkrX48qQAobr5ds2MblH9E2PCKOjcBAfLiwzCo21C3dAFb6m8KPeMFygCxhnV1xzm1JLfx3aTr6MyiwSA_G4xlKpwFySPXi4JbE48VhlDQft6vSDEw_j_Fbb3KzQy61NuneDuVUMASu43SJ7pndhppLj9rqDsuZTsL1sMtMPOOd1u-zWoMIvx4xSeSpOE_ZsDqVlLDOL2Qms4Mpp9SAbw%3D%3D) | |
---
**A post-COVID reinvention of higher education**

By Bobby Jindal
|
---
It is no secret our postsecondary institutions have floundered during the pandemic. In October of 2020, researchers confirmed that disruptions caused by the pandemic have impacted college access, with more than 40 percent of U.S. households canceling all their plans for community college and more than 15 percent of households canceling plans for four-year schooling. Without a college education, America's low-income students, especially students of color, are more likely to be locked out of high-quality and in-demand programs that lead to stable, high-demand job opportunities.

Postsecondary education in America has not made the shifts it needs to prepare students for the rapid changes in the economy and society, which is why we are at risk of a new equity crisis from this pandemic. Before the pandemic, only 51 percent of Americans saw college as very important despite its clear positive impact on the lifetime earnings of college graduates. Students have cited costs, length of programs, and personal constraints as challenges to obtaining a college degree. The higher education sector needs to evolve to meet these students' needs, as non-traditional postsecondary opportunities help students join a rapidly changing, skill-based workforce.

...

_Read the full article**[here](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=1efe712963fc490889ca4f3bc946e7c8&_e=JTEvL-Zg71hyYIebmHSaZOJaVuillFrQ2_dijWWMnCt1rxlLaOau4BoflTkEdhqZiq0N408dzTmcyD6c_KyyYdS0Sp0loeolF2VaFG-HV3CtZSOqThSpp17NH4wrz8DB03CXKgv1Wh-Bp4lFXvs6c3Njs-NF22VUKCFQSYLDUkuMlANsF0gmvLOO4qQYQv4iufurUvhVbYJMwlqYKX0RMhzsrNxnZQcrkFrHntjsq9JGLdQfW6n163CLbMq3suQJRTSnkR6stSpHx8euMOT1XM9ec0MmZbXz2T0rZw2amrwNRgBrhZXhvMufOROLNJ1aBSTrK2Z1ynO0yeGvuyyHTmY5sxn79GTH17mYqIReB_0%3D)**._

name: Grassroots Action
subject: Why do we pay more in taxes than big corporations?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC
body:
electgrassroots.org [electgrassroots.org]It's time for corporations to pay their fair share
During the pandemic, billionaires have gotten 54% richer at the same time as record unemployment has hit the working class
Hi Peter,
Trickle down economics doesn't work. When the wealthiest Americans get tax breaks, the working class has been hit by record unemployment and not enough support, especially since the start of Covid-19. In fact, CNN reports that the billionaires have gotten 54% more wealthy during the pandemic. [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/billionaire-wealth-covid-pandemic-12-trillion-jeff-bezos-wealth-tax/]
I don't know about you, but this last year was financially hard on me and so many others. And while there's plenty of reasons why we need to have more Democrats who aren't reliant on corporate funding, at the end of the day, they passed $1.9 trillion in relief this year compared to the $1.9 trillion that the GOP gave in tax breaks to the exact people who need it the least.
We need more members of Congress and more Senators who will fight for us, not for their corporate donors. It's time to reclaim our political power - join us today to elect more working class candidates. [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=4521]
Chip in [secure.actblue.com/donate/electgrassroots?refcode=4521]Thanks for all you do,
Elisa Cardnell
Founder/Executive Director

subject: ICYMI: Our new Justice Democrat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
**Did you see the news? After months of candidate recruitment, we 've announced our newest Justice Democrat: Odessa Kelly for Congress in TN-05.**
This is our very first endorsement for the 2022 primaries, and we're so excited to get started on Odessa's campaign. Odessa is an activist and public servant from Nashville, and she's ready to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, free public college, housing justice, racial justice, and much more.
**[We set a goal to raise $50,000 for Odessa's campaign in the first 24 hours after her launch this morning. Will you donate right now to help us reach our goal for Odessa? 100% of your contribution will go to Odessa's campaign against a corporate Democrat.](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=094fbbaf83&e=eff630ad9c)**
**[Contribute $25](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=b3c243d994&e=eff630ad9c)**
Born and raised in Nashville, Odessa understands how the system is rigged against working families who have spent their lives playing by the rules. She has seen loved ones forced to make decisions out of desperation and will bring that perspective to Congress.
She's already a progressive fighter for the people of Nashville, but to win this race, she'll need a ton of grassroots support to beat the corporate incumbent. That means strong fundraising right from the start.
**[Can you help Odessa's campaign start strong with a donation right now? Every dollar shows the political establishment and reporters that we have a serious progressive primary challenger ready to win a seat in Congress.](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=9fc5571301&e=eff630ad9c)**
Thank you for whatever support you can give,
Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director
Justice Democrats
**[Donate](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=d8dde7753b&e=eff630ad9c)**

subject: It's Time to Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:

If President Biden is "such a nice guy," then why isn't he taking action to fix this crisis that he caused?

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=7ccfa80e0baf4de496331ec0f3f1f76c&_e=MyGUVVzcdG_iv_all-2Y-YmzPYITnel-EKP-rXQACtA5gSE6RBEARjbknB4IRjTSX9E3Ard0KG825qwacSLhzPCIj5VXgml0NlV4MUUAB3E0qSsyX42fQUSm9bl_lmp3CUDlfyzrsbJPTtS3vdGRYzAoEubX5N2K2j5VnCPIhnejX-oVJLFAHOdjCE7767jddadfkj3oxTab998Z0KdT1gckqaWEmJIK6Bi2vHmqtkLeS_vNKogDVPn7ZRpaaLWY3bYkKaB2r1JnvQCr2Q9KdKYO1SKWO_iEjw5togmtgfcKFeLyIji-l0rG5IC7z-KFDhCywVHIxS8t0Xsyq032lFvfZw8X1jeGwCDeiBU97X-SjEf3j9MRw4tryyvAMZQ6rF8EZU3AmA1mfqH06cDTi1zal1gtHPcIGVZrYG9rx-rl_XE-0SE7mglFrHKrH-0NPB2U6yeDgXiDKgPofoGNVerZElWlVfYY_BYumhA-Aa519Dr2yeBcthTrki6XaSfO2nin9xkPZdPxGLO3rzD6-w%3D%3D)

Hi Friends,

I just got back from the border, and **it was pure chaos. President Biden continues to do nothing about the crisis that he and his administration engineered.**

I saw families and children struggling. President Biden told them to come, and now he is telling them to leave? None of it adds up.

**If President Biden is "such a nice guy," then why isn't he taking action to fix this crisis that he caused?** | [**$50 TO BRING BACK TRUMP'S BORDER POLICIES** ](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=7ccfa80e0baf4de496331ec0f3f1f76c&_e=MyGUVVzcdG_iv_all-2Y-YmzPYITnel-EKP-rXQACtA5gSE6RBEARjbknB4IRjTSX9E3Ard0KG825qwacSLhzPCIj5VXgml0NlV4MUUAB3E0qSsyX42fQUSm9bl_lmp3CUDlfyzrsbJPTtS3vdGRYzAoEubX5N2K2j5VnCPIhnejX-oVJLFAHOdjCE7767jddadfkj3oxTab998Z0KdT1gckqaWEmJIK6Bi2vHmqtkLeS_vNKogDVPn7ZRpaaLWY3bYkKaB2r1JnvQCr2Q9KdKYO1SKWO_iEjw5togmtgffOAZKu5NJke4sWgrE9IP4qvP2ve_7reKnwI7IV7nUEvZA4GtT9Qa7sVyiyMMEPw1f_hU1pRooBJUT3_uBmn_tpbMVeRSGrrTib9v52uYqMs47fGlSMDtqbOxUTIH1eSxVRkucU3uk9Ilo_oCo_-EI83zZpI56A4TtThoFx1ShTsGds952GOV00UYdZgZRTW-_92gDoTYrFkuZ6MSetCSw_wsZOVlSo-ZdTobmflK_trg%3D%3D)

clean_body: If President Biden is "such a nice guy," then why isn't he taking action to fix this crisis that he caused? | Hi Friends, I just got back from the border, and it was pure chaos. President Biden continues to do nothing about the crisis that he and his administration engineered. I saw families and children struggling. President Biden told them to come, and now he is telling them to leave? None of it adds up. If President Biden is "such a nice guy," then why isn't he taking action to fix this crisis that he caused? | Trump's border policies were WORKING, but the Biden Administration wanted to play political games and erase Trump's successful policies. President Biden can simply solve this problem and bring back I saw the chaos first hand, and I need help from the American people to send President Biden and his administration a message to bring back Trump's policies and fix this crisis. | "Mike Braun for Indiana" | "Mike Braun for Indiana" | "Mike Braun for Indiana" | "Mike Braun for Indiana" | "Mike Braun for Indiana" | "Mike Braun for Indiana" I hope President Biden thinks hard about the crisis that he caused and go back to the commonsense policies that were working under Donald Trump. Thank you, Senator Mike Braun Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: I’m Insulted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Let’s work together to send Gavin Newsom packing. Read more >>>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/a8161798badb32fdc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, I’m insulted that California elites like Gavin Newsom are trying to tie this recall to extremists.

It’s not true. Don’t fall for his lies.

He’s covering years of failures that have led to high unemployment, closing businesses down without following the science, and shutting down schools.

Our kids continue to fall behind, businesses remain shuttered, and when people called for help from the state’s unemployment system, they were kept on hold indefinitely. All this while Newsom dines with his lobbyist friends, his children go to school in person, and his businesses continue to remain open. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/1270b4568cb9196ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) What’s worse, when it came to actually delivering unemployment funds to those most in need because of his lockdowns, he instead sent billions in fraud to prisoners. That’s taxpayer money we’ll never get back.

It’s clear Newsom can’t deliver the basics so he’s trying to save his own failed political career by disparaging the millions of Democrats, Republicans, and Independents who have worked to get him out of office.

Now you know the truth. Let’s work together to send Gavin Newsom packing and elect a Governor who will stand up for businesses, reform our unemployment system to get people the help they deserve and open our schools. [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/4af4c28ae95fb16dc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Let’s get this done. It’s time for the California Comeback.

Kevin Faulconer
Candidate for Governor | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/d029312ca1d940ddc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/b268db35958d7481c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/1d903fd4d354e03f/ea3a5d53ffdea43fc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: UPDATE! RE: Arkansas just banned health care for trans youth — We need the Equality Act now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We need you to take action now to pass the Equality Act.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210405-1992-header&t=1&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)
Last week we told you about Arkansas’ HB 1570 — the bill sitting on the Governor’s desk that would ban trans youth from accessing gender-affirming health care.
Well, the Governor announced today that he has vetoed HB 1570. This is a huge win made possible by the thousands of people who spoke out against this abhorrent attack.
But we must keep fighting to stop similar bills like these in their tracks — including in the 27 other states voting on anti-trans legislation.
**Last week we shared a crucial petition calling on the Senate to pass the Equality Act, but your name is missing.** [Can you help us keep the momentum and put more pressure on the Senate to pass the Equality Act by adding your name?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/pass-equality-act-now/?source=em20210405-1992&t=4&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)
**[Add your name](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/pass-equality-act-now/?source=em20210405-1992&t=5&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)**
This monumental bill would update federal civil rights protections for LGBTQIA+ folks, AND update protections for all women and people of color in areas like transportation, retail spaces, and more. And it would stop bills like HB 1570 dead in their tracks.
It’s 2021. And, it’s time we finally update our civil rights protections to ensure everyone is able to move through the world as their true selves — we won’t wait any longer.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210405-1992-footer&t=6&refcode2=1992_2526796_lcDyRM&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=1992%2E2526796%2ElcDyRM). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: Why early fundraising matters for Odessa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
Traditionally, politics has been the rich man’s game. Why? Because to successfully launch a campaign, you need to have access to a Rolodex of wealthy friends ready to pitch in thousands of dollars in the first few weeks of announcing you are running. Corporate Democrat Jim Cooper has been playing this game for a while now.
Over nearly 40 years in office, more than 75% of his campaign donations have come from corporate PACs. He’s one of the wealthiest members of Congress. Simply put, he’s too conservative, tied to corporate interests, and out-of-touch. Odessa Kelly, a community activist and Justice Democrat, is challenging Cooper to represent Tennessee’s Fifth Congressional District.
**[Odessa doesn’t have a decades-old campaign account filled with corporate PAC money — she’s a first-time candidate not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. She’s relying on grassroots support to power her campaign to unseat Cooper. Chip in whatever you can right now directly to Odessa’s campaign to get her off to a strong start!](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=1233c818a7&e=eff630ad9c)**
**[Contribute $25](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=a5a69a0a90&e=eff630ad9c)**
Not only is Rep. Cooper one of the wealthiest members of the U.S. House, but he’s also one of the most conservative Democrats. As recently as 2019, Cooper voted for Republican measures like the “Balanced Budget Amendment,” which would’ve cut Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. This deep blue district in Nashville should have a representative in Congress pushing for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, not trying to cut our existing social safety net.
**Odessa Kelly is the progressive we need in TN-05.** As co-founder of Stand Up Nashville, Odessa has fought and won progress on economic and racial justice for the people of Tennessee. Now, she’s ready to bring that fight to Congress.
**[Odessa needs your support today to go up against the corporate PAC money flowing into Cooper’s campaign. Chip in whatever you can directly to Odessa’s campaign today!](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=959734b3d1&e=eff630ad9c)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=4ddf412114&e=eff630ad9c)**
---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://justicedemocrats.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2e6d452c7041b20ec387a8de&id=457b2fec67&e=eff630ad9c&c=15df94a880). Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.
